title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies: Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Oncology Therapies (SAC-OT) : Agenda
Location : 1600 Scott Street, Holland Cross, Tower B,  Room 2048 Date &  time : June 14,  2019, 8:30 AM - 4:15 PM Participants : SAC-OT members, guest speakers, Health Canada employees 8:00-8:30 Refreshments
8:30-9:00 Opening  Remarks Melissa Hunt (Director, Bureau of Metabolism, Oncology and Reproductive Sciences,
Therapeutic Products Directorate; TPD) Review of the Agenda, Declaration of Affiliations and Interests Dr. Alexander H.G. Paterson (Chair)
9:00-9:30 Tumor-Agnostic  Cancer Treatment (TACT) Definitions Precision/Personalized Oncology: Clinician's Perspective Presenter: Dr. Gwyn Bebb Precision Oncology: Researcher's Perspective Presenter: Dr. Steve Robbins
9:30-10:00 TACT: Current  Pre-Market Regulatory Landscape Presenters: TPD, Biologics and Genetic Therapies Directorate (BGTD)
10:00-10:30 TACT:  Post-market Considerations Presenter: Marketed Health Products Directorate (MHPD)
10:45-11:15 Canadian  Clinical Context Presenter: Dr. Gwyn Bebb
11:15-12:00 Deliberations SAC-OT members
13:00-16:00 Deliberations SAC-OT members
16:00-16:15 Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of  Meeting Dr. Alexander H.G. Paterson  (Chair)
